productDisplayName: Wildcraft Unisex Black Poncho Rain Jacket
description: Style Note wildcraft, the outdoor experts, give you this raincoat with unique styling which makes it easy to wear and can Fit anyone. Waterproof, breathable, water repellend and wind proof coat is an essential on your outdoor adventures and when you are braving the rains. Easy to pack, compact and lightweight, carrying it is no hassle either. Product Details Black raincoat, has a hood with toggle straps, haul loop inside the hood to hang the raincoat half buttoned placket with velcro closure, open at the sides with velcro closures at intervals and comes with a small bag Material and Care Blended Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry or iron or dry clean Size FreesizePlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
